use_cases: Hero section background with dynamic falling triangles effect for landing pages
Loading screen animation with colorful geometric shapes falling in 3D space
Decorative background effect for media and entertainment websites
Visual divider or section break with animated triangle particles
ai_summary: A mesmerizing falling triangles animation component that renders 200 geometric triangles with randomized sizes, colors, and rotation angles against a dark radial gradient background. Uses CSS 3D transforms with perspective to create depth as triangles animate across the viewport in continuous infinite loops. Features vibrant HSL color generation with grayscale filter for a cohesive aesthetic. Perfect for hero sections, loading screens, or as a dynamic background element for modern web applications.
